raw_consumer_statement:
Home Depot delivered a lawn mower in error on XX/XX/year> and the lawn mower was returned but I have been unable to get a credit from the store or the credit card company. 

The attachments show the email and text I received on XX/XX/year> saying the mis-delivered lawn mower was returned and also photos of the Home Depot driver picking up the lawn mower on XX/XX/year>.
